originalTitle: In pictures: Stars and fans celebrate Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding
summary: Celebrities and sports stars were spotted as the A-list couple tied the knot in New York on Friday.
content:
Swift has described herself as "a long time Hugh Grant stan", and invited the British actor with his wife Anna Elisabet Eberstein

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding took over New York City on Friday, as the star-studded ceremony drew dozens of fans outside Madison Square Garden.

The two-day event shut down one of the busiest areas of New York, with a barrage of A-list celebrities, such as Selena Gomez, Camila Cabello, Hugh Grant, Gracie Abrams, Ellie Goulding, Graham Norton and Dakota Johnson, on the guest list.

No official pictures from inside the venue have been released, and many of the estimated 1,000 attendees entered without being photographed, but some were spotted on their way in and out.

Singer Benson Boone supported Swift on her Eras Tour

Supermodel Karlie Kloss became close friends with Swift more than a decade ago

Ted Lasso actor Jason Sudeikis was also in attendance, two years after he used a comedy event to ask Kelce when he "would make an honest woman" out of Swift

Singer Camila Cabello, a friend of Swift, was photographed in New York before the ceremony

Actor Ethan Hawke appeared in the video for Swift's 2024 single Fortnight

Former US football player Abby Wambach and author Glennon Doyle were pictured arriving

Seattle Seahawks player Cooper Kupp and his wife Anna Marie Kupp

NFL player Isiah Pacheco (left) is one of Kelce's team-mates at Kansas City Chiefs

Swift's childhood friend Abigail Anderson was among the guests

US television presenter Jimmy Fallon has interviewed Swift on his Tonight Show

Irish actor Andrew Scott was among the others pictured leaving the stadium after a night of celebrations

Model Gigi Hadid and actor Bradley Cooper

Actors Jessica Alba and Danny Ramirez

Hordes of fans had braved sweltering temperatures behind barricades surrounding the stadium

Dozens of police officers were deployed to patrol the stadium and its surroundings

The couple's nuptials were confirmed outside the stadium at around 19:30 local time, with an announcement that read: "JUST&T MARRIED!"

Outside the stadium, there was a buzz of excitement as onlookers reacted to the wedding announcement

One fan vowed to chant Taylor Swift's name outside the venue 100,000 times and stream it live on YouTube

Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler

Dior dress, Adam Sandler and a man of honour: what we know about Taylor and Travis's wedding

From friendship bracelets to wedding rings: A Taylor and Travis timeline
chineseTitle: 图片中：明星和粉丝庆祝泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯的婚礼
chineseSummary: 周五，这对一线明星夫妇在纽约喜结连理，众多名人和体育明星被拍到。
chineseContent:
斯威夫特形容自己是“老休·格兰特·斯坦”，并邀请了这位英国演员与他的妻子安娜·伊丽莎白·埃伯斯坦

泰勒·斯威夫特和特拉维斯·凯尔斯的婚礼于周五在纽约举行，明星云集的仪式吸引了麦迪逊广场花园外的数十名粉丝。

为期两天的活动关闭了纽约最繁忙的地区之一，嘉宾名单上包括赛琳娜·戈麦斯、卡米拉·卡贝洛、休·格兰特、格雷西·艾布拉姆斯、艾莉·古尔丁、格雷厄姆·诺顿和达科塔·约翰逊等一大批一线名人。

场馆内部的官方照片尚未发布，大约 1,000 名与会者中有许多人没有被拍照，但也有一些人在进出时被发现。

歌手本森·布恩 (Benson Boone) 在斯威夫特的 Eras 巡演中支持她

十多年前，超级名模卡莉·克劳斯 (Karlie Kloss) 与斯威夫特成为了亲密的朋友

泰德·拉索 (Ted Lasso) 演员杰森·苏戴奇斯 (Jason Sudeikis) 也出席了此次活动，两年前，他在一次喜剧活动中询问凯尔斯何时“会从斯威夫特身上塑造出一个诚实的女人”

斯威夫特的朋友、歌手卡米拉·卡贝洛 (Camila Cabello) 在颁奖典礼前在纽约被拍到

演员伊桑·霍克出现在斯威夫特 2024 年单曲《双周》的视频中

前美国足球运动员艾比·万巴赫和作家格伦农·多伊尔被拍到抵达

西雅图海鹰队球员库珀·库普和他的妻子安娜·玛丽·库普

NFL 球员伊塞亚·帕切科（左）是凯尔斯在堪萨斯城酋长队的队友之一

斯威夫特的儿时好友阿比盖尔·安德森也是嘉宾之一

美国电视节目主持人吉米·法伦在他的《今夜秀》中采访了斯威夫特

爱尔兰演员安德鲁·斯科特（Andrew Scott）是其他被拍到在庆祝一晚后离开体育场的人之一

模特吉吉·哈迪德和演员布莱德利·库珀

演员杰西卡·阿尔芭和丹尼·拉米雷斯

成群结队的球迷冒着酷热的天气在体育场周围的路障后面

数十名警察被部署在体育场及其周边地区巡逻

这对夫妇的婚礼于当地时间 19:30 左右在体育场外得到确认，公告上写着：“JUST＆T MARRIED！”

体育场外，围观者对婚礼的宣布感到兴奋不已

一名粉丝发誓要在场外高喊泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 的名字 10 万遍，并在 YouTube 上进行直播

泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 在亚当·桑德勒 (Adam Sandler) 主持的纽约婚礼上与特拉维斯·凯尔斯 (Travis Kelce) 结婚

迪奥礼服、亚当·桑德勒和一位荣誉人物：我们对泰勒和特拉维斯婚礼的了解

从友谊手镯到结婚戒指：泰勒和特拉维斯的时间表
